focus: traceability alignment across packet ledgers, resource-map classifications, requirement evidence, active references, and spec mirrors

findingDetails.title: Completion claims are not traceable to the task/checklist ledgers
findingDetails.evidence: Implementation summary claims COMPLETE and all P0/P1 acceptance criteria met, but tasks completion criteria remain unchecked at tasks.md:128-131 and checklist totals remain [ ]/17 P0 and [ ]/12 P1 at checklist.md:139-140.
findingDetails.recommendation: Either update task/checklist ledgers with evidence after verification, or downgrade implementation-summary completion claims until the ledgers are complete.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Contradiction is packet-local across implementation-summary.md:33, tasks.md:128-131, and checklist.md:139-140; mirror docs carry the same unchecked state.

findingDetails.title: Resource map marks active stale-reference surfaces OK
findingDetails.evidence: Resource-map OK rows cover Gemini command docs and active CP-041/CP-042 playbooks, but active evidence still shows obsolete Gemini YAML names and old .opencode/agents/improve-agent.md cat commands.
findingDetails.recommendation: Update the resource map to mark these rows failing/needs-fix until F001/F002 are remediated, and use active line evidence rather than planned target state.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Resource-map OK rows at lines 57, 83, and 112-113 conflict with active stale evidence at .gemini/commands/deep/start-agent-improvement-loop.toml:158, .gemini/commands/deep/start-agent-improvement-loop.toml:60, CP-041:77, and CP-042:73.
